author: DigitalSword99
name: Fugue SwiGLU 10L
blurb: SwiGLU activation replacing relu^2, 10 transformer blocks at 512 dim with GQA (8 heads, 4 KV heads). SwiGLU provides better gradient flow and expressiveness per parameter. Extra layer uses headroom freed by improved int8+zlib compression of SwiGLU weights.
